attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT OPL_HDRS.HEADER_FLOW_ID, 
OPL_HDRS.HEADER_ID, OPL_HDRS.ORDER_NUMBER, 
OPL_HDRS.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF, OPL_HDRS.ORG_ID, OPL_HDRS.CUST_PO_NUMBER, 
OPL_HDRS.ORDER_CATEGORY, OPL_HDRS.ORDER_TYPE_ID, OPL_HDRS.PRICE_LIST_ID, 
OPL_HDRS.PRICE_LIST_NAME, OPL_HDRS.PROGRAM_TYPE, OPL_HDRS.GOVERNMENT_ORDER_FLAG, OPL_HDRS.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, 
OPL_HDRS.ORDER_ORIGIN, OPL_HDRS.INTENDED_USE, OPL_HDRS.CURRENCY_CODE, OPL_HDRS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, OPL_HDRS.CISCOAM_USER_ID, 
OPL_HDRS.ROUTE_TO_MARKET, OPL_HDRS.QUOTE_CREATION_DATE, OPL_HDRS.DEAL_ID, OPL_HDRS.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE, 
OPL_HDRS.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY, OPL_HDRS.BOOKED_DATE, OPL_HDRS.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, OPL_HDRS.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID, 
OPL_HDRS.RESELLER_BID, OPL_HDRS.PAYMENT_METHOD, OPL_HDRS.TAXABILITY, OPL_HDRS.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOID, 
OPL_HDRS.BILLTO_PGTMVBEID, OPL_HDRS.BILLTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID, OPL_HDRS.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
 OPL_HDRS.BILLTO_CHANNELID, OPL_HDRS.HYBRID_ORDER_FLAG, OPL_HDRS.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER, OPL_HDRS.CREATION_DATE, 
 OPL_HDRS.CREATED_BY, OPL_HDRS.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, OPL_HDRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, OPL_HDRS.IPADDRESS, OPL_HDRS.APPLICATION_NAME, 
 OPL_HDRS.SERVICE_CONTEXT_TYPE, OPL_HDRS.SERVICE_CONTEXT_VERSION, OPL_HDRS.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, OPL_HDRS.PROXY_USERNAME, 
 OPL_HDRS.PROXY_USERID, OPL_HDRS.PROXY_USEREMAIL, OPL_HDRS.USEREMAIL, OPL_HDRS.CCP_HOLD_CAUSE, OPL_HDRS.CREDIT_ANALYST_EMAIL, OPL_HDRS.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_ID, OPL_HDRS.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_NAME, OPL_HDRS.HOLD_AMOUNT, OPL_HDRS.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOID, OPL_HDRS.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN, OPL_HDRS.TOTAL_ORDER_AMOUNT, OPL_HDRS.EXCEPTION_FLAG, OPL_HDRS.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEID, OPL_HDRS.EXCEPTION_MSG, OPL_HDRS.SOLDTO_CHANNELID, OPL_HDRS.SOLDTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID, OPL_HDRS.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, OPL_HDRS.OPEN_FLAG, OPL_HDRS.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG, OPL_HDRS.APPROVAL_CODE,
OPL_HDRS.MIGRATION_TYPE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
OPL_HDRS.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
OPL_HDRS.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,
OPL_HDRS.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,
OPL_HDRS.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
OPL_HDRS.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE,
OPL_HDRS.CANCELLED_FLAG,
OPL_HDRS.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
OPL_HDRS.BILLING_DEPARTMENT,
OPL_HDRS.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,
OPL_HDRS.SUB_AGENT_NAME,
OPL_HDRS.SUB_AGENT_ID,
OPL_HDRS.MASTER_AGENT_ID,
OPL_HDRS.TRANSACTION_FLOW,
OPL_HDRS.DEAL_TYPE, /* Added as part of Q1FY22 SEP Athena Rel*/
OPL_HDRS.QUOTE_TYPE,
OPL_HDRS.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,
OPL_HDRS.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
  FROM
  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL OPL_HDRS
  WHERE HEADER_ID NOT IN
  (SELECT HEADER_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL)

SELECT XXOPL_HEADER.HEADER_FLOW_ID, 
   (CASE WHEN XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_ORIGIN= 'B2B-COMMERCE' AND XXOPL_HEADER.HEADER_ID IS NULL THEN XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_NUMBER ELSE XXOPL_HEADER.HEADER_ID END) HEADER_ID, /*This Column is Modified for GROGU March Release*/
   XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_NUMBER, XXOPL_HEADER.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ORG_ID, XXOPL_HEADER.CUST_PO_NUMBER,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_CATEGORY, XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_TYPE_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.PRICE_LIST_ID, XXOPL_HEADER.PRICE_LIST_NAME,
   XXOPL_HEADER.PROGRAM_TYPE, 'N' GOVERNMENT_ORDER_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_ORIGIN,
   XXOPL_HEADER.INTENDED_USE, XXOPL_HEADER.CURRENCY_CODE,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, XXOPL_HEADER.CISCOAM_USER_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ROUTE_TO_MARKET, 
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.QUOTE_CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
   XXOPL_HEADER.DEAL_ID, 
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
   XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY, 
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.BOOKED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
   XXOPL_HEADER.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, XXOPL_HEADER.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.RESELLER_BID, XXOPL_HEADER.PAYMENT_METHOD,
   XXOPL_HEADER.TAXABILITY, XXOPL_HEADER.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.BILLTO_PGTMVBEID, XXOPL_HEADER.BILLTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.BILLTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, XXOPL_HEADER.BILLTO_CHANNELID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.HYBRID_ORDER_FLAG, XXOPL_HEADER.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER,
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), XXOPL_HEADER.CREATED_BY,
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
   XXOPL_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   'UNKNOWN' IPADDRESS, 'UNKNOWN' APPLICATION_NAME,
   'UNKNOWN' SERVICE_CONTEXT_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN' SERVICE_CONTEXT_VERSION,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, XXOPL_HEADER.PROXY_USERNAME,
   XXOPL_HEADER.PROXY_USERID, XXOPL_HEADER.PROXY_USEREMAIL,
   XXOPL_HEADER.USEREMAIL, XXOPL_HEADER.CCP_HOLD_CAUSE,
   XXOPL_HEADER.CREDIT_ANALYST_EMAIL, XXOPL_HEADER.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.ECONOMIC_CUSTOMER_NAME, XXOPL_HEADER.HOLD_AMOUNT,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOID, XXOPL_HEADER.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN,
   XXOPL_HEADER.TOTAL_ORDER_AMOUNT, XXOPL_HEADER.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEID, XXOPL_HEADER.EXCEPTION_MSG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SOLDTO_CHANNELID, XXOPL_HEADER.SOLDTO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SOLDTO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, XXOPL_HEADER.OPEN_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG, XXOPL_HEADER.APPROVAL_CODE ,
   Cast('1900/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   XXOPL_HEADER.MIGRATION_TYPE, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
   Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
   Coalesce(XXOPL_HEADER.OPPORTUNITY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,
   Coalesce(XXOPL_HEADER.CAPTURE_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,
   /* Added as part of SFP Rel */
   XXOPL_HEADER.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.DISTI_SO_NUMBER,
   CASE WHEN XXOPL_HEADER.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG = 'NA' OR XXOPL_HEADER.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG IS NULL THEN '=' ELSE XXOPL_HEADER.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG END AS SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
   XXOPL_HEADER.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE,
   XXOPL_HEADER.CANCELLED_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
   XXOPL_HEADER.BILLING_DEPARTMENT,
  XXOPL_HEADER.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,
XXOPL_HEADER.SUB_AGENT_ID,
   XXOPL_HEADER.MASTER_AGENT_ID,
XXOPL_HEADER.SUB_AGENT_NAME,
XXOPL_HEADER.TRANSACTION_FLOW,
XXOPL_HEADER.DEAL_TYPE, /* Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
CASE WHEN XXOPL_HEADER.QUOTE_TYPE='Non Standard' THEN 'Non-Standard Deal' /*Added as part of may release*/
                WHEN XXOPL_HEADER.QUOTE_TYPE='Standard' THEN 'Standard Deal'
            ELSE
                XXOPL_HEADER.QUOTE_TYPE
             END AS QUOTE_TYPE /* Added for may release */,
XXOPL_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER,
XXOPL_HEADER.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
 FROM 
  $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOPL_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL XXOPL_HEADER
  QUALIFY Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY (CASE WHEN ORDER_ORIGIN= 'B2B-COMMERCE' AND HEADER_ID IS NULL THEN ORDER_NUMBER ELSE HEADER_ID END) ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
  /*HEADER_ID Column Expression in PARTITION BY is Modified for GROGU March Release*/
  WHERE (INTENDED_USE IS NULL OR  Upper(intended_use) <> 'NPI TEST')
  --AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE IN ('SQL COMPUPDATE','INSERT')
  /*AND (NOT ( EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES EL  
WHERE (COALESCE(XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)=EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID) AND EL.NAME='Acquisitions')
OR  UPPER(COALESCE(XXOPL_HEADER.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')) IN ('ACQ-APPD','ACQ-WEBX','ACQ-WEBEX')))*/
AND Cast(Cast(XXOPL_HEADER.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
 >Cast('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
